---
title: "About"
pagetitle: "About – CANCOTS 2027"
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-body">
<main class="content">
```

## About CANCOTS

[Describe the history and purpose of the CANCOTS conference series here.]

## Organizing Committee

| Name | Institution | Role |
|------|-------------|------|
| [Name] | [University] | Chair |
| [Name] | [University] | Program Committee |
| [Name] | [University] | Local Arrangements |

## Program Committee

*Program committee members will be listed here.*

## Contact

For general inquiries: [cancots2027@example.com](mailto:cancots2027@example.com)

```{=html}
</main>

<aside class="sidebar">
  <div class="sidebar-box">
    <h3>Quick Links</h3>
    <ul>
      <li><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
      <li><a href="theme.html">Theme &amp; Papers</a></li>
      <li><a href="program.html">Program</a></li>
      <li><a href="registration.html">Registration</a></li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</aside>
</div>
```
